title: DungeonCraft Adventures [PHTB]
description: Custom DungeonCraft modpack for use on a private SMP
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5cfa10c0509cf6f2bdef60fb7d2ba8af360c43.png) ## FEATURES: ### WORLD GENERATION 👉 Overhauled overworld terrain and biome generation from [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics), [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/mod/geophilic), and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/mod/tectonic) \ 👉 New nether biomes and structures from [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium), [Moog's Nether Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mns-moogs-nether-structures), and more \ 👉 New End biomes and structures from [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape), [Moog's End Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mes-moogs-end-structures), and more \ 👉 Backported modern minecraft features introduced in **_Bundles of Bravery_**, **_The Garden Awakens_**, **_Spring to Life_**, **_Chase the Skies_**, **_and Chaos Cubed_** \ 👉 Major redesign of vanilla dungeons and structures \ 👉 New dungeons and structures of varying difficulty from [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Roguelike Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/roguelikedungeons), and more ### EXPLORATION AND SURVIVAL 👉 [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite) - 4 new tiers of Netherite with their own unique properties \ 👉 New food/crops from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), [Farm & Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm), and a few select add-ons \ 👉 Gravestones that protect your items from despawning upon death \ 👉 [Void Totem](https://modrinth.com/mod/voidtotem) to protect you from falling into the void \ 👉 Craftable and upgradeable backpacks from [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) \ 👉 [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), and [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) to aid in exploration/navigation ### BUILDING 👉 [Effortless Structure](https://modrinth.com/mod/effortless) - create structures and designs with ease \ 👉 New furniture/decorative blocks from [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and more \ 👉 Player-built shops from [Spud's Shops](https://modrinth.com/mod/spuds-shops) ### MISCELLANEOUS 👉 **NO NEED TO INSTALL OPTIFINE!** Builtin shader support, connected textures, and other Optifine features \ 👉 Lots of Quality of life and performance/optimizatiom mods
NOT COMPATIBLE WITH OPTIFINE!
## CREDITS:
Resource Packs
  • Fresh Waystones Texture
  • Hellim's Xaero's Maps Mob Icons
  • Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD
  • Sparkles: Stardust Labs Resourcepack
  • Enderscape More Emissives
  • Stay True (CurseForge)
  • Traveler's Backpack Overhaul
  • Xaero's Map Frame
  • Xaero's Vanilla GUI
  • xali's Enchanted Books
  • xali's Enchanted Books - Addon
Shader Pack Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
